overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment with towering megabuildings, digital billboards, and moderate pedestrian activity on a clear sunny day.

events.description: character passes a standing pedestrian on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk toward the megabuilding

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: distinctive pyramid-shaped skyscraper with multiple tiers and glass facade
large digital screen displaying animated advertisement with bright colors
gray concrete pavement with red painted curb
rectangular concrete planters with small vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk with a massive triangular megabuilding towering ahead. Digital billboards display animated advertisements on the building facade. The character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction near red planter boxes.

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
white vintage car drives past on the right side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white vintage sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on dark asphalt
classic white sedan with chrome details driving past
dark asphalt road surface with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the wide urban street. A white vintage car drives past on the right as the character crosses the white-striped asphalt. The triangular megabuilding remains visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: reaches opposite sidewalk and turns left to continue walking
walks under the shadow of the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing commercial storefronts

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure casting shadows overhead
large teal billboard with 'PURE OVERCLOCK' text and graphics
building facade with yellow signage and storefront at street level

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character turns left and walks along a commercial sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows under the overpass. Large digital billboards including one for 'Pure Overclock' line the street-level buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with vendors and homeless encampments

events.description: briefly focuses on an NPC in red plaid shirt with blue interaction marker above head
passes street vendor cart with yellow umbrella and scattered trash

agents.ego_description: walking past street vendors and homeless encampments along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow safety vest standing near vendor cart

entered.detail: blue food cart with large yellow umbrella and cooking equipment
makeshift shelter with tarps, cardboard, and scattered belongings
blue and white garbage bags piled on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk past a street vendor cart with a yellow umbrella and a small homeless encampment with scattered trash bags. The elevated highway remains visible to the left while the character briefly focuses on an NPC with an interaction marker.

events.description: approaches traffic light showing red at intersection
navigates through increased pedestrian traffic on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking toward a busy intersection with traffic lights and digital signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and shorts walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: traffic signal with red light and pedestrian crosswalk signals
red neon sign reading 'FOOD CAFE' on building facade
large vertical digital screen with purple and teal graphics

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy commercial intersection with a red traffic light ahead. A 'FOOD CAFE' sign and large digital billboards dominate the streetscape. The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians as steam vents rise from the street level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city center that shifts from an open vista of towering megabuildings to the shadowed corridors of a commercial district. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk where the character walks toward a massive triangular megabuilding adorned with animated digital billboards, passing a pedestrian near red planter boxes. As the character steps onto a white-striped crosswalk, a white vintage car drives past before the camera follows the character turning left into the diffused shadows beneath a massive elevated highway. The scene then progresses past a street vendor with a yellow umbrella and a small homeless encampment, with the highway remaining visible to the left as the character approaches an NPC. Finally, the environment opens up into a busy commercial intersection where steam vents rise from the street and large digital billboards, including one for a food cafe, dominate the crowded streetscape.
